request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local community forum - our neighbors in Maplewood just got their first civil defense drill in 5 years. Kids loved it! Made me think - when was the last time our town practiced emergency preparedness? We owe it to our families to push for regular drills. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
